name: srdf
description: MoveIt2 SRDF generation, validation, and planning-semantics workflow. Use when creating, editing, regenerating, inspecting, or validating `.srdf` files, `gen_srdf()` sources, MoveIt planning groups, virtual joints, passive joints, end effectors, group states, disabled collisions, URDF-linked planning semantics, or SRDF handoff to CAD Explorer review. Use the URDF skill for robot structure, the SDF skill for simulator descriptions, and the render skill for rendering, Explorer links, and optional
author: earthtojake
summary_zh: 专用于 MoveIt2 的规划语义工作流工具，帮你轻松生成、编辑和验证机器人配置，特别适合在搭建或检查机器人运动规划时使用。
